subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou seest Thy servant who is believing in Thee, and supplicating through the door of Thy Oneness. Render her all good through Thy Bounty and Generosity. Thou art the Bestower, the Giver.
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی تری امتک الموقنه بک و بایاتک المتضرعه بباب احدیتک قدر لها کل خیر بفضلک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
